name: Full Counter With Increment And Decrement
description: Counter scope with Change event, resonant value binding, handler updating value, and two methods that emit Change. README §Resonance. WILL_FAIL_UNTIL_FIX: 'u8:value >>- Change -> 0' is currently parsed as ResonancePush(u8:value, Pointing(Change,0)); intended Pointing(ResonancePush(u8:value,Change),0). See PARSER_NOTES anomaly #1.
